description: Operator asks for a decision or go/no-go style answer
alpha_strength_hypothesis: May help when hidden evidence or stop-condition risk exists
plain_strength_hypothesis: May win when a short direct answer is sufficient
evidence_source: A3-1 and Batch B post-interpretation decision

alpha_strength_hypothesis: May help when the comment must remove unsafe or unsupported wording
plain_strength_hypothesis: May win on concise format fit
key_failure_mode: Alpha may turn a comment into a process memo
evidence_source: Batch B interpretation review and lift-vs-polish diagnostic plan

description: Brief explanation of a finding or caveat
alpha_strength_hypothesis: May help when the explanation requires evidence uncertainty or artifact caveat
plain_strength_hypothesis: May win when the requested output is very short
key_failure_mode: Alpha may bury the answer under caveats
evidence_source: A3-1 defects and Batch B brevity signal

description: Release or changelog wording where validation scope matters
alpha_strength_hypothesis: May help by preventing unsupported validation or readiness claims
plain_strength_hypothesis: May win on simple wording cleanup

description: Public-facing claim cleanup involving superiority or benchmark risk
alpha_strength_hypothesis: May help by offering safer alternatives and non-claims
plain_strength_hypothesis: May win when only a terse rewrite is needed
key_failure_mode: Alpha may overcorrect into unusable language
evidence_source: Claim-boundary calibration packet and post-interpretation decision

description: Question involving committed repository evidence versus external planning ledger
alpha_strength_hypothesis: May help enforce source hierarchy and evidence limits
plain_strength_hypothesis: May win on a simple source-of-truth reminder
key_failure_mode: Alpha may over-explain or imply external ledger proof

description: Rewrite or reject unsafe agent instructions
alpha_strength_hypothesis: May help preserve safe intent while removing unsafe action
plain_strength_hypothesis: May win on very short cleanup tasks
key_failure_mode: Alpha may include too much policy or operational detail

description: Task where preservation or stopping is part of correctness
alpha_strength_hypothesis: May help identify stop conditions and preservation order
plain_strength_hypothesis: May win on simple reminder prompts
key_failure_mode: Alpha may create unnecessary process steps
evidence_source: Artifact preservation controls and Batch B artifacts

description: Explain why raw payloads are excluded or sanitized
alpha_strength_hypothesis: May help balance auditability with leakage prevention
key_failure_mode: Alpha may disclose or request excessive metadata
evidence_source: Artifact preservation controls and run artifacts

description: Checklist for evaluation or docs workflow
alpha_strength_hypothesis: May help when ordering and blinding constraints matter
plain_strength_hypothesis: May win when checklist should remain very short

description: Instruction to implement or not implement within boundaries
alpha_strength_hypothesis: May help detect forbidden runtime/provider/routing changes

key_failure_mode: Alpha may propose unauthorized feature work

description: Synthesis across limited runs and planning artifacts
alpha_strength_hypothesis: May help preserve counter-evidence and non-claims
plain_strength_hypothesis: May win on short fact summaries
